quotes.text: Just a moment longer. It seems that the parts for my new creation have arrived.
Come, my assistants! These raw materials are in need of processing!
Incompetent oafs! Goregrind! Try not to damage those limbs.
How vexing. Rotspew! Get to work, and don't fail me like your predecessor!
No! Now I have to rebuild those two from scratch! It seems I must take matters.
I can't wait to put your corpse to use.
My greatest... was yet... to come....
